data.name: Windows_BuiltInChatPlugin_PowerShell_Description
data.value: Provides the ability to execute PowerShell scripts, allowing direct interaction with the system. However, it is also dangerous and may result in accidental file deletion or system crashes.

data.name: Windows_BuiltInChatPlugin_Everything_Description
data.value: Use Everything (a high-performance local file search engine) to search for files on your computer.

data.name: Windows_BuiltInChatPlugin_Everything_SearchFiles_Description
data.value: Search files using Everything search engine.

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Description
data.value: Use the built-in Windows speech recognition engine for offline dictation.

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Notification_NoSupportedLanguages
data.value: No Windows speech recognition languages are installed. Add a speech language in Windows settings to use voice input.

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Notification_UnsupportedLocale
data.value: Windows speech recognition does not support {0}. Install the matching speech language in Windows settings.

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Notification_ConstraintCompilationFailed
data.value: Windows speech recognition could not be prepared: {0}

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Notification_MicrophoneUnavailable
data.value: The microphone is unavailable. Check microphone permissions and device settings.

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Notification_TopicLanguageNotSupported
data.value: The selected Windows speech language is not available for dictation.

data.name: WinRTSpeechRecognitionEngine_Notification_NetworkFailure
data.value: Windows speech recognition reported a network failure. Check Windows speech settings.
